svg.aria-label: The Agent Card: a public description a peer agent serves at /.well-known/agent-card.json. The card document on the left shows its fields: name billing-agent; description Issues refunds and credits for orders; url https://billing.acme.example/a2a; version 1.0.0; a skills list with one skill, id process_refund, description Issue a refund for an order, input modes application/json, output modes application/json; capabilities streaming false; authentication schemes bearer. On the right, a discovery arrow shows the support agent fetching the card with the JSON-RPC method agent/getCard, learning skills process_refund and auth bearer. Below that an allowlist gate decides trust: if the card name is on the allowlist the gate is OPEN and delegation proceeds; billing-agent is allowlisted, so delegation proceeds. A second, rogue card refund-bot-9000 with auth none is also discoverable, but it is NOT on the allowlist, so the gate is CLOSED and delegation is REFUSED. Discovering a peer is not trusting it.
svg.title: The Agent Card at /.well-known/agent-card.json: discovery fetches it; an allowlist gate decides trust before delegation.

svg.text: A public card at /.well-known/agent-card.json advertises skills + auth. An allowlist gate decides who you actually delegate to.

svg.text: How a caller authenticates. The card advertises auth; it does NOT confer trust.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif

svg.text: The card is just data. Anyone can serve one and claim any skill. It tells

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif

svg.text: you what a peer SAYS it can do and how to reach it. Whether you act on

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif

svg.text: that is a separate decision, made by the allowlist gate on the right.

svg.text: Is the card's name on the allowlist? Discovery is not trust.

svg.text: if card.name in allowlist: gate OPEN → delegate (tasks/send)

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif

svg.text: else: gate CLOSED → delegation REFUSED, result tagged UNTRUSTED

svg.text: The deep treatment (injection via a delegated result, the lethal trifecta) is Part 16.

svg.text: An Agent Card advertises a peer's skills + auth at a well-known URL; discovery is just fetching it. Discovery is NOT trust:

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif

svg.text: an allowlist gate decides who you delegate to, refuses unvetted peers, and tags any outside output UNTRUSTED.
